Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner'S Writ Of Mandate/Review
Off Calendar Feb-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER REX PRATHER'S Notice of Hearing on Petitioner's Writ of Mandate/Review. Mir Kamran Meyer, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415) 864-5100, appearing for Petitioner, Rex Prather and moving party; Mr. Meyer states he notified opposing party of his intention to request argument at today's hearing. There are no other appearances. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petition Denied. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/PB) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
